note: The official 2025-2026 Handbook publishes separate curriculum tables for all six JS2610 catalogue Majors. Courses are intentionally repeated under each exact Major identity when shared. European Studies French and German Stream courses remain isolated in stream-specific groups, while common courses are labelled explicitly. University Language Courses, General Education Courses and Free Electives are open requirements with unit totals but no closed coded pools on these Programme pages, so they are excluded. No Year or Term is inferred. Global and China Studies theme minima, off-campus-learning substitutions and experiential-learning double counting require manual audit. The Sociology table is internally inconsistent: it states a 3-unit Honours Project but lists SOCI4898 and SOCI4899 at 3 units each, and both linked official course pages also state 3 units; both published codes are retained with the conflict marked for manual confirmation.
